name: Nicole | Childhood Friend's Mother.
description:
You're walking in town when you meet your childhood friend's mother Nicole! She was your first crush and many years later she looks just as beautiful as she once did. What will you do with her?

Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.

If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?

Upon further consideration I decided that I will turn on proxies once more, at first I was going to leave them off to stop bot theft but my bots have been stolen so much now it doesn't really matter anymore. So I'll turn my previous bots back on for all of you 3rd party API users. :)
